items.institution: MGMT Methylation Prediction for GBM Patients
details: Prediction of MGMT promoter methylation status for glioblastoma patients from medical and histological images.
Tools: Medical Imaging, Image Processing, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Data Fusion, Keras, TensorFlow

items.institution: Web Interface for MGMT Promoter Status Prediction
details: Web application that predicts MGMT promoter status from uploaded histological images, with a deep learning backend.
Tools: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Flask, Ngrok
Early mortality prediction in intensive care units using deep learning on electronic medical records.
Tools: Predictive Analytics, Big Data, Deep Learning, Azure, Data Classification
Predictive models for Alzheimer's disease, depression, liver cancer, megaloblastic anemia, drug sensitivity, adverse drug reactions, frequent exacerbators, and nosocomial infections.
Tools: Python, Keras, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Statistical Data Analysis
